privacy.section1Body: We collect information you provide when creating an account, including your name, email address, and birth details (date, time, and place of birth). We also collect usage data such as chat conversations and generated reports.
privacy.section2Body: Your information is used to generate birth charts, horoscopes, and personalized astrological insights. We use chat data to improve our AI models. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.section3Body: All data is encrypted using AES-256 at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit. We follow industry-standard security practices to protect your information.
privacy.section4Body: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. You can request deletion of your data at any time through your account settings.
privacy.section5Body: We use third-party payment processors for subscription billing. These processors have their own privacy policies regarding your payment information.
privacy.section6Body: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We also use analytics cookies to improve our platform. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacy.section7Body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You can also export your data at any time through your account settings.
privacy.section8Body: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at privacy@somaandsurya.com.
privacy.title: শিরোনাম
refund.section1Body: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans. If you are not satisfied with our service, you can request a full refund within 30 days of purchase.
refund.section2Body: To be eligible for a refund, you must request it within 30 days of your initial purchase. Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days.
refund.section3Body: You can request a refund by contacting our support team at support@somaandsurya.com. Include your account email and reason for the refund request.
refund.section4Body: In certain cases, we may offer partial refunds at our discretion. This typically applies to usage-based add-ons or services.
refund.section5Body: Custom development services, enterprise contracts, and third-party services are non-refundable.
refund.section6Body: We reserve the right to update this refund policy. Users will be notified of any material changes via email.
refund.title: শিরোনাম

terms.section10Body: We may update these terms at any time. Users will be notified of material changes via email or platform notification.
terms.section1Body: By using Soma & Surya, you agree to these terms of service. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform.
terms.section2Body: Soma & Surya provides AI-powered Vedic astrology services including birth chart generation, horoscopes, compatibility analysis, and AI chat consultations.
terms.section3Body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must provide accurate birth details for accurate astrological calculations.
terms.section4Body: Paid plans are billed monthly or annually as selected. You can cancel your subscription at any time. Refunds are governed by our refund policy.
terms.section5Body: You agree to use the platform for personal, non-commercial purposes. You may not misuse the AI chat service or attempt to reverse engineer our algorithms.
terms.section6Body: The platform, including its AI models, algorithms, and content, is the intellectual property of Soma & Surya. Generated reports are for personal use only.
terms.section7Body: Astrological readings are for entertainment and guidance purposes. We are not responsible for decisions made based on astrological insights.
terms.section8Body: Your use of the platform is governed by our Privacy Policy. We take data protection seriously.
terms.section9Body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or engage in fraudulent activity.
terms.title: শিরোনাম

numerology.desc1: Independent, creative, and ambitious. You are a natural leader who thrives on innovation and originality.
numerology.desc2: Cooperative, balanced, and intuitive. You excel at building bridges and creating harmony.
numerology.desc3: Expressive, optimistic, and charismatic. Your creativity and communication skills inspire others.
numerology.desc4: Practical, disciplined, and reliable. You build lasting foundations through hard work.
numerology.desc5: Freedom-loving, versatile, and curious. You embrace change and seek new experiences.
numerology.desc6: Caring, responsible, and compassionate. You find fulfillment in serving others.
numerology.desc7: Analytical, spiritual, and wise. You delve deep into life's mysteries.
numerology.desc8: Ambitious, efficient, and driven. You manifest success through determination.
numerology.desc9: Compassionate, generous, and visionary. Your empathy transforms the world.
numerology.desc11: Highly intuitive, inspired, and enlightened. You bridge the spiritual and material.
numerology.desc22: Visionary with practical power. You turn dreams into reality on a grand scale.
numerology.desc33: Compassionate wisdom elevated. You guide humanity through spiritual insight.
